These .pure files are vendored verbatim from the FINOS legend-pure project.

  repository: https://github.com/finos/legend-pure
  commit:     8f4632caebd6367ed8cb368a967a44f419df459e
  license:    Apache-2.0 (see the legend-pure repository)

Files and their source paths under legend-pure-core/legend-pure-m3-core/src/main/resources/platform/pure/:

  m3.pure        <- grammar/m3.pure
  relation.pure  <- relation.pure
  variant.pure   <- variant/variant.pure
  milestoning.pure <- grammar/milestoning.pure

m3.pure is the bootstrap of the Pure M3 metamodel: every metaclass (Class,
Property, Type, GenericType, Multiplicity, Enumeration, ...) is written as an
instance of meta::pure::metamodel::type::Class using Pure's low-level
instance-construction syntax. It is parsed by pure_python.codegen.parser.

relation.pure, variant.pure and milestoning.pure define further platform
types using Pure's ordinary readable class grammar (Class path<T> extends ...
{ prop : Type[mult]; }). They are parsed by pure_python.codegen.grammar.

To refresh: re-clone legend-pure at the desired commit, copy the files above,
then run `python -m pure_python.codegen.generate`.
